title: Trimble (TRMB) to Widen Farmer Reach With Bilberry Acquisition
text: Trimble (TRMB) inks a deal to buy Bilberry to enhance its crop-protection solutions and solidify its Agriculture Division.

title: Trimble Sets Ambitious Climate Goals for Reducing Greenhouse Gas Emissions in Line with a Net-Zero Future
text: Science-Based Targets for Emissions Reductions Across Trimble Operations and  Value Chain to Accelerate Company's Efforts to Combat Climate Change Company Releases 2021 Sustainability Report  SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Aug. 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today its commitment to reduce greenhouse gas emissions in line with the ambitious goals of the Paris Agreement and a net-zero future to keep global temperature increase to 1.5°C.

title: Trimble to Acquire Bilberry to Extend its Selective Spraying Capabilities for Sustainable Farming
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Aug. 30, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today that it has signed a definitive agreement to acquire privately-held Bilberry, a French technology company specializing in selective spraying systems for sustainable farming.

title: MiX Telematics to acquire Trimble's Field Service Management Business
text: BOCA RATON, Fla. , Aug. 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- MiX Telematics (JSE: MIX) (NYSE: MIXT), a leading global SaaS provider of connected fleet management solutions, announced today that the company has signed a definitive agreement to acquire Trimble's Field Service Management's (FSM) business.

title: Trimble and CLAAS Strategic Alliance Develops Next-Generation Precision Farming System for CLAAS Agriculture Equipment
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Aug. 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- As part of a strategic alliance, Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) and CLAAS have developed a next-generation precision farming system for CLAAS tractors, combines and forage harvesters.

title: Trimble Ventures Invests in Sabanto--an Autonomous Farming-as-a-Service Company
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Aug. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble Ventures, Trimble's (NASDAQ: TRMB) corporate venture capital fund, announced today its investment in Sabanto, Inc. Sabanto is a U.S.-based agricultural technology company focusing on autonomous workflows throughout the farming cycle being offered as Farming as a Service (FaaS).

title: Trimble Showcases Customer-Driven Platform Strategy to Open its Insight Tech Conference + Expo
text: Annual Transportation Event Dedicated to Enhancing Supply Chain Collaboration and Connectivity ORLANDO, Fla. , Aug. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) kicked off its 2022 Insight Tech Conference + Expo by highlighting its focus on empowering and enabling carriers, shippers and brokers to work better together.

title: Trimble RTX Integrity Validates Positioning Data Accuracy to Support Safety-Critical Applications
text: Providing Even More Reliable Measurements for Users of Trimble CenterPoint RTX Fast Networks in North America and Europe  SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Aug. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) introduced today data integrity monitoring for its precise point positioning (PPP) correction service, CenterPoint® RTX Fast.

title: Trimble (TRMB) Q2 Earnings, Revenues Outpace Estimates
text: Trimble's (TRMB) second-quarter results are driven by solid momentum across buildings & infrastructure, and resources & utilities segments.

title: Trimble Inc. (TRMB) CEO Rob Painter on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Trimble Inc. (NASDAQ:TRMB ) Q2 2022 Results Conference Call August 5, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Rob Painter - CEO David Barnes - CFO Conference Call Participants Jason Celino - KeyBanc Rob Wertheimer - Melius Research Chad Dillard - Bernstein Jerry Revich - Goldman Sachs Kristen Owen - Oppenheimer Jonathan Ho - William Blair Tami Zakaria - JP Morgan Erik Lapinski - Morgan Stanley Operator Good day, and welcome to the Trimble Incorporated Financial Results Conference Call. Please note, today's conference is being recorded.

title: Trimble's 2nd-quarter transportation revenue drops 8%
text: Supply chain technology provider Trimble Inc. reported on Friday an 8% year-over-year (y/y) drop in transportation revenue to $150 million. Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) reported total revenue of $941 million, a 0.4% decrease from the second quarter of 2021.

title: Trimble Navigation (TRMB) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Trimble (TRMB) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.92% and 1.93%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Trimble Announces Second Quarter 2022 Results
text: Record annualized recurring revenue of $1.51 billion, up 12 percent and 15 percent on an organic basis Second quarter total revenue of $941 million, up 6 percent on an organic basis SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Aug. 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble Inc. (NASDAQ:TRMB) today announced financial results for the second quarter of 2022.
